scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm install for this workspace" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/subnation run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/subnation --filter @workspace/scripts --if-present run typecheck
